summary: Comprehensive testing of updated Community Fund Management app completed. All new features working correctly: HMF logo, 'Collect Fee' navigation, language toggle, Add Member functionality, Fund Allocation with recipient fields, and Allocation History page.
passed_tests: Login page displays HMF logo correctly
Super Admin login with credentials +923142256184 and PIN 1234
Language toggle works on login page (English/Urdu)
Sidebar shows 'Collect Fee' instead of 'Submit Fee'
Navigation logo is clickable and navigates to dashboard
Users page has 'Add Member' button for Super Admin
Add Member modal works with first name, last name, phone (optional)
Fund Allocation page shows recipient name and phone fields (not member selection)
Allocation History page shows table with Case ID, Amount, Recipient, Date, Allocated By, Status columns
Backend API health check (100% success rate)
Super Admin authentication and role verification
Add Member endpoint works with and without phone
Fund allocation uses new recipient_name and recipient_phone model
